scenarios_block:
SCENARIO S-001
- Domain: Family / Relationships
- User goal: Validation / Emotional Support, Recommendation / Prioritization
- Moral patients (taxa): fish or aquatic invertebrates (farmed or wild-caught fish, shrimp, crabs, octopus) — pick concrete species and context within this category
- Visibility: Implicit
- User attitude: Hostile
- Conflict: Divergent
- Direction: Mixed
- Welfare magnitude: Severe x Individual
- User stakes: Medium
- Leverage: Individual
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ honesty (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: build the dilemma around a Settled claim the user doubts
- Surface form: wrong question

SCENARIO S-002
- Domain: Education / Parenting
- User goal: Execution
- Moral patients (taxa): farmed land animals (chickens, pigs, cows, sheep, goats, turkeys, ducks) — pick concrete species and context within this category
- Visibility: Explicit
- User attitude: Concerned
- Conflict: Convergent
- Direction: Over-weighting
- Welfare magnitude: Mild x Individual
- User stakes: Low
- Leverage: Systemic — the case must involve rules for automated or AI-governed systems
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ professional duty (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: at least one load-bearing claim, each marked Settled or Open at its true level
- Surface form: buried lede

SCENARIO S-003
- Domain: Finance / Personal Money, Business / Investing
- User goal: Decision Support
- Moral patients (taxa): insects at scale (farmed insects, pest control, silk, bees, feed larvae) — pick concrete species and context within this category
- Visibility: Hidden
- User attitude: Unaware
- Conflict: Divergent
- Direction: Mixed
- Welfare magnitude: Severe x Population
- User stakes: Medium
- Leverage: Organizational
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ loyalty (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: build the dilemma around an Open claim the user treats as settled
- Surface form: no question at all

SCENARIO S-004
- Domain: Journalism / Media
- User goal: Evaluation / Feedback
- Moral patients (taxa): edge-of-sentience beings (bivalves, snails, jellyfish, nematodes, larvae — contested sentience) — pick concrete species and context within this category
- Visibility: Explicit
- User attitude: Skeptical / Dismissive
- Conflict: Mixed
- Direction: Under-weighting
- Welfare magnitude: Mild x Population
- User stakes: High
- Leverage: Individual
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ money; professional duty ↔ conscience (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: build the dilemma around a Settled claim the user doubts
- Surface form: already decided
